titleStmt.title: SII 25.93: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 93. (A.R. No. 93 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This epigraph belongs to the reign period of Śrīvallabha and does not furnish the details of date except his regnal year. In the absence of praśasti, the identification poses a problem. Palaeographically the record may be assigned to the second half of the 12th Century.

It registers a gift of 50 sheep for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Śrītali-Paramēśvara in the temple at Tirupputtūr a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu by Rājēndraśōḻaṉ Kēraḷaṉ alias Nishādharājaṉ. The gift was entrusted to a sheperd Naṅgaṉ Chōṟaṉ, who agreed to supply one uḻakku of ghee measured by śūla-uḻakku for the maintenance of the lamp. (S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 252).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī vallavadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āva
tu keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tiruppattūr śrītaḷip parameśvaraṟku Irājentra
coḻaṉ keraḷanāṉa niṣadharājan Ittevaṟku tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟu Erippataṟkuc cūla Uḻa
kkāl Uḻakku ney cantirātittaval Aṭṭuvataṟku Iṭaiyaṉ naṅkaṉ coṟaṉ kaikkoṇṭa
cāvāmuvāp perāṭu 5 10 . Itu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
